'''Ash Lynn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and an attendee of the [[Jrade District/Legends|Jrade District]] [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] drive in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Her background check by the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]] did not pass, and he fell under [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] suspicion along with [[Bray Kopedon]] and [[Drake Lo'gaan/Legends|Jodd Sonta]].
